details.note: Processor create() returns Handle with process() that takes LLM.StreamInput and returns Result. Service tag: @opencode/SessionProcessor. Context.Service pattern with Layer.effect(). Handle has getter for message, updateToolCall, completeToolCall, process.

runLoop is the outer loop. Creates assistant msg, resolves agent, calls processor.create(), then handle.process() with LLM.StreamInput. Tool gating via Permission.Ruleset. Subagent spawning via TaskTool. Phase is implicit in loop steps.
AgentSchema = Schema.StructWithRest with known fields. Lifecycle field can be added as optional Schema field with StructWithRest rest handling.
Agent.Info is Schema.Struct with name, permission, mode, etc. Can add optional lifecycle field. Lifecycle config flows from config/agent.ts through normalize/merge into Agent.Info.

details.change: Made description optional in PhaseSchema and Phase interface

Rewrote with hook-based API (onProcessorRun/onRepair/onPhaseEnter/onPhaseExit), proper error handling via catchCause, fixed abort escalation to record result before return, added condition:always transition support
Renamed constants to UPPER_CASE: CARTographer_lifecycle → CARTOGRAPHER_LIFECYCLE, etc
Barrel re-exports from definition, engine, and builtins
Removed description from Phase required array
